    }
    .mg-date-divider::before { left: 0; }
    .mg-date-divider::after  { right: 0; }

    .mg-msg-row { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 2px; align-items: flex-end; }
    .mg-msg-row.mine { flex-direction: row-reverse; }

    .mg-msg-avatar {
      width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 8px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      font-size: 0.9rem; flex-shrink: 0; margin-bottom: 2px;
    }

    .mg-bubble {
      max-width: 65%; padding: 10px 14px;
      border-radius: 18px; font-size: 0.88rem; line-height: 1.5;
      font-weight: 500; position: relative; word-break: break-word;
      animation: mgBubble 0.2s ease;
    }
    @keyframes mgBubble { from{opacity:0;transform:scale(0.95) translateY(4px)} to{opacity:1;transform:scale(1) translateY(0)} }

    .mg-bubble.theirs {
      background: #1E1E2A;
      color: #E0DCF5;
      border-bottom-left-radius: 4px;
    }
    .mg-bubble.mine {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6366F1, #8B5CF6);
      color: white;
      border-bottom-right-radius: 4px;
    }
    .mg-bubble-time {
      font-size: 0.62rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); font-weight: 500;
      margin-top: 4px; text-align: right;
    }
    .mg-bubble.theirs .mg-bubble-time { text-align: left; }
    .mg-bubble-status { font-size: 0.65rem; }

    /* Typing indicator */
    .mg-typing {
      display: flex; gap: 4px; padding: 12px 16px;
      background: #1E1E2A; border-radius: 18px; border-bottom-left-radius: 4px;
      width: fit-content; margin-bottom: 4px;
    }
    .mg-typing-dot {
      width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: #6366F1;
      animation: mgTypeDot 1.2s infinite;
    }
    .mg-typing-dot:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.2s; }
    .mg-typing-dot:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.4s; }
    @keyframes mgTypeDot { 0%,60%,100%{transform:translateY(0);opacity:0.4} 30%{transform:translateY(-6px);opacity:1} }

    /* Input area */
    .mg-input-area {
      padding: 14px 20px;
      background: #1A1A22;
      border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .mg-input-row {
      display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: flex-end;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
      border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
      border-radius: 16px; padding: 8px 8px 8px 16px;
      transition: border-color 0.2s;
    }
    .mg-input-row:focus-within { border-color: rgba(99,102,241,0.4); }
    .mg-textarea {
      flex: 1; background: transparent; border: none; outline: none;
      color: white; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif;
      font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500; resize: none;
      max-height: 120px; min-height: 24px; line-height: 1.5;
      padding: 4px 0;
    }
    .mg-textarea::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); }
    .mg-send-btn {
      width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 12px;
      border: none; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6366F1, #8B5CF6);
      color: white; font-size: 1rem; cursor: pointer;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      flex-shrink: 0; transition: all 0.2s;
    }
    .mg-send-btn:hover { transform: scale(1.08); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(99,102,241,0.4); }
    .mg-send-btn:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; }
    .mg-input-hint { font-size: 0.68rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); text-align: center; margin-top: 8px; }

    /* Empty state */
    .mg-empty {
      flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); text-align: center; padding: 40px;
    }
    .mg-empty-icon { font-size: 3.5rem; margin-bottom: 16px; opacity: 0.4; }
    .mg-empty-title { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 8px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); }
    .mg-empty-sub   { font-size: 0.82rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); }

    /* No conversation selected */
    .mg-no-conv {
      flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      background: #0F0F13; text-align: center; padding: 40px;
    }
    .mg-no-conv-icon { font-size: 4rem; margin-bottom: 20px; opacity: 0.2; }
    .mg-no-conv-title { font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 700; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25); margin-bottom: 8px; }
    .mg-no-conv-sub   { font-size: 0.85rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.12); }

    @media(max-width: 700px) {
      .mg-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .mg-sidebar { display: none; }
      .mg-sidebar.show { display: flex; position: fixed; inset: 56px 0 0 0; z-index: 50; }
    }
  `;
  document.head.appendChild(style);
};

// ── Helpers ──
const STORAGE_KEY = 'childcare_messages_v2';

const loadAllMessages = () => JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY) || '{}');
const saveAllMessages = (data) => localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(data));

const getConvKey = (a, b) => [a, b].sort().join('::');

const getConvMessages = (emailA, emailB) => {
  const all = loadAllMessages();
  return all[getConvKey(emailA, emailB)] || [];
};

const addMessage = (fromEmail, toEmail, text) => {
  const all  = loadAllMessages();
  const key  = getConvKey(fromEmail, toEmail);
  const msgs = all[key] || [];
  const msg  = {
    id: Date.now(),
    from: fromEmail,
    to: toEmail,
    text,
    time: new Date().toISOString(),
    read: false,
  };
  all[key] = [...msgs, msg];
  saveAllMessages(all);
  return msg;
};

const markRead = (emailA, emailB, myEmail) => {
  const all = loadAllMessages();
  const key = getConvKey(emailA, emailB);
  if (!all[key]) return;
  all[key] = all[key].map(m => m.to === myEmail ? { ...m, read: true } : m);
  saveAllMessages(all);
};

const formatTime = (iso) => {
  const d = new Date(iso);
  return d.toLocaleTimeString('en-IN', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });
};

const formatDate = (iso) => {
  const d   = new Date(iso);
  const now = new Date();
  if (d.toDateString() === now.toDateString()) return 'Today';
  const y = new Date(now); y.setDate(y.getDate() - 1);
  if (d.toDateString() === y.toDateString()) return 'Yesterday';
  return d.toLocaleDateString('en-IN', { day:'numeric', month:'short' });
};

// ── Demo contacts per role ──
const DEMO_CONTACTS = {
  parent: [
    { email:'priya@care.com',  name:'Priya Sharma',  role:'caretaker', emoji:'👩‍🍼', color:'#F0FDF4', online:true  },
    { email:'meera@care.com',  name:'Meera Patel',   role:'caretaker', emoji:'👩',   color:'#FFF0F6', online:false },
    { email:'admin@admin.com', name:'Support Admin', role:'admin',     emoji:'🔐',   color:'#FFF8E1', online:true  },
  ],
  caretaker: [
    { email:'rahul@parent.com', name:'Rahul M.',      role:'parent', emoji:'👨',   color:'#EFF6FF', online:true  },
    { email:'sneha@parent.com', name:'Sneha K.',      role:'parent', emoji:'👩',   color:'#FFF0F6', online:false },
    { email:'admin@admin.com',  name:'Support Admin', role:'admin',  emoji:'🔐',   color:'#FFF8E1', online:true  },
  ],
  admin: [
    { email:'rahul@parent.com', name:'Rahul M. (Parent)',      role:'parent',    emoji:'👨',   color:'#EFF6FF', online:true  },
    { email:'sneha@parent.com', name:'Sneha K. (Parent)',      role:'parent',    emoji:'👩',   color:'#FFF0F6', online:false },
    { email:'priya@care.com',   name:'Priya (Caretaker)',      role:'caretaker', emoji:'👩‍🍼', color:'#F0FDF4', online:true  },
    { email:'meera@care.com',   name:'Meera (Caretaker)',      role:'caretaker', emoji:'👩',   color:'#ECFDF5', online:false },
  ],
};

// Seed demo messages so chats aren't empty
const seedDemoMessages = (myEmail, contacts) => {
  const all = loadAllMessages();
  let changed = false;
  contacts.forEach(c => {
    const key = getConvKey(myEmail, c.email);
    if (!all[key] || all[key].length === 0) {
      all[key] = [
        { id:1, from:c.email, to:myEmail, text:`Hi! I'm ${c.name}. How can I help you today?`, time: new Date(Date.now()-3600000).toISOString(), read:true },
        { id:2, from:myEmail, to:c.email, text:'Hello! Great to connect with you.', time: new Date(Date.now()-3500000).toISOString(), read:true },
        { id:3, from:c.email, to:myEmail, text:'Feel free to message me anytime! 😊', time: new Date(Date.now()-600000).toISOString(), read:false },
      ];
      changed = true;
    }
  });
  if (changed) saveAllMessages(all);
};

const ROLE_COLORS = { parent:'#3B82F6', caretaker:'#059669', admin:'#F59E0B' };
const ROLE_BG     = { parent:'rgba(59,130,246,0.15)', caretaker:'rgba(5,150,105,0.15)', admin:'rgba(245,158,11,0.15)' };

export default function Messages() {
  const navigate   = useNavigate();
  const { user }   = useAuth();
  const role       = user?.role?.toLowerCase() || 'parent';
  const myEmail    = user?.email || 'me@user.com';
  const myName     = user?.name || user?.fullName || 'Me';

  const contacts   = DEMO_CONTACTS[role] || DEMO_CONTACTS.parent;
  const [selected, setSelected]   = useState(null);
  const [messages, setMessages]   = useState([]);
  const [input,    setInput]      = useState('');
  const [search,   setSearch]     = useState('');
  const [unread,   setUnread]     = useState({});
  const [typing,   setTyping]     = useState(false);
  const bottomRef  = useRef(null);
  const textRef    = useRef(null);
  const pollRef    = useRef(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    injectCSS();
    seedDemoMessages(myEmail, contacts);
    computeUnread();
  }, []);

  const computeUnread = useCallback(() => {
    const counts = {};
    contacts.forEach(c => {
      const msgs = getConvMessages(myEmail, c.email);
      counts[c.email] = msgs.filter(m => m.to === myEmail && !m.read).length;
    });
    setUnread(counts);
  }, [myEmail, contacts]);

  // Poll every 2 seconds for new messages
  useEffect(() => {
    pollRef.current = setInterval(() => {
      if (selected) {
        const fresh = getConvMessages(myEmail, selected.email);
        setMessages([...fresh]);
      }
      computeUnread();
    }, 2000);
    return () => clearInterval(pollRef.current);
  }, [selected, myEmail, computeUnread]);

  // Scroll to bottom when messages change
  useEffect(() => {
    bottomRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
  }, [messages]);

  const selectConv = (contact) => {
    setSelected(contact);
    const msgs = getConvMessages(myEmail, contact.email);
    setMessages(msgs);
    markRead(myEmail, contact.email, myEmail);
    setUnread(prev => ({ ...prev, [contact.email]: 0 }));
    setTimeout(() => textRef.current?.focus(), 100);
  };

  const sendMessage = () => {
    const text = input.trim();
    if (!text || !selected) return;
    addMessage(myEmail, selected.email, text);
    setInput('');
    const fresh = getConvMessages(myEmail, selected.email);
    setMessages([...fresh]);

    // Simulate reply after 2–4 seconds
    const delay = 2000 + Math.random() * 2000;
    setTyping(true);
    setTimeout(() => {
      const replies = [
        'Got it! I\'ll get back to you shortly.',
        'Thanks for reaching out! 😊',
        'Sure, let me check on that for you.',
        'Understood! I\'ll take care of it.',
        'Thanks! Is there anything else you need?',
        'Of course! Happy to help.',
      ];
      const reply = replies[Math.floor(Math.random() * replies.length)];
      addMessage(selected.email, myEmail, reply);
      setTyping(false);
      const updated = getConvMessages(myEmail, selected.email);
      setMessages([...updated]);
    }, delay);
  };

  const handleKeyDown = (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) {
      e.preventDefault();
      sendMessage();
    }
  };

  // Group messages by date
  const grouped = messages.reduce((acc, msg) => {
    const d = formatDate(msg.time);
    if (!acc[d]) acc[d] = [];
    acc[d].push(msg);
    return acc;
  }, {});

  const filteredContacts = contacts.filter(c =>
    c.name.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase())
  );

  const lastMsg = (email) => {
    const msgs = getConvMessages(myEmail, email);
    return msgs[msgs.length - 1];
  };

  return (
    <div className="mg-root">
      {/* Top bar */}
      <div className="mg-topbar">
        <button className="mg-back" onClick={() => navigate(-1)}>← Back</button>
        <div>
          <div className="mg-topbar-title">
            <div className="mg-online-dot" />
            Messages
          </div>
          <div className="mg-topbar-sub">ChildCare Platform · {role.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+role.slice(1)}</div>
        </div>
        <div className="mg-topbar-right">
          <div className="mg-role-badge" style={{ background: ROLE_BG[role], color: ROLE_COLORS[role], border:`1px solid ${ROLE_COLORS[role]}33` }}>
            {role === 'parent' ? '👨‍👩‍👧' : role === 'caretaker' ? '👩‍🍼' : '🔐'} {role.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+role.slice(1)}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Layout */}
      <div className="mg-layout">
        {/* Sidebar */}
        <div className="mg-sidebar">
          <div className="mg-search-wrap">
            <span className="mg-search-icon">🔍</span>
            <input
              className="mg-search"
              placeholder="Search conversations..."
              value={search}
              onChange={e => setSearch(e.target.value)}
            />
          </div>

          <div className="mg-conv-list">
            <div className="mg-conv-group-label">Conversations</div>
            {filteredContacts.map((c, i) => {
              const last    = lastMsg(c.email);
              const unreadN = unread[c.email] || 0;
              return (
                <div
                  key={c.email}
                  className={`mg-conv-item ${selected?.email === c.email ? 'active' : ''}`}
                  onClick={() => selectConv(c)}
                  style={{ animationDelay:`${i*0.06}s` }}
                >
                  <div className="mg-conv-avatar" style={{ background: c.color }}>
                    {c.emoji}
                    {c.online && <div className="mg-conv-online" />}
                  </div>
                  <div className="mg-conv-info">
                    <div className="mg-conv-name">{c.name}</div>
                    <div className="mg-conv-preview">
                      {last ? (last.from === myEmail ? '✓ You: ' : '') + last.text : 'Start a conversation'}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="mg-conv-meta">
                    <div className="mg-conv-time">{last ? formatTime(last.time) : ''}</div>
                    {unreadN > 0 && <div className="mg-conv-badge">{unreadN}</div>}
                  </div>
                </div>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Chat */}
        {!selected ? (
          <div className="mg-no-conv">
            <div className="mg-no-conv-icon">💬</div>
            <div className="mg-no-conv-title">Select a conversation</div>
            <div className="mg-no-conv-sub">Choose a contact from the left to start messaging</div>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="mg-chat">
            {/* Chat header */}
            <div className="mg-chat-header">
              <div className="mg-chat-avatar" style={{ background: selected.color }}>
                {selected.emoji}
              </div>
              <div>
                <div className="mg-chat-name">{selected.name}</div>
                <div className="mg-chat-status">
                  {selected.online ? '🟢 Online' : '⚫ Offline'}
                  {' · '}{selected.role.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+selected.role.slice(1)}
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="mg-chat-actions">
                <button className="mg-chat-action-btn" title="Call" onClick={() => alert('📞 Call feature coming in Phase 2!')}>📞</button>
                <button className="mg-chat-action-btn" title="Info">ℹ️</button>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Messages */}
            <div className="mg-messages">
              {Object.keys(grouped).length === 0 ? (
                <div className="mg-empty">
                  <div className="mg-empty-icon">👋</div>
                  <div className="mg-empty-title">Say hello!</div>
                  <div className="mg-empty-sub">Start the conversation with {selected.name}</div>
                </div>
              ) : (
                Object.entries(grouped).map(([date, msgs]) => (
                  <React.Fragment key={date}>
                    <div className="mg-date-divider">{date}</div>
                    {msgs.map(msg => {
                      const isMine = msg.from === myEmail;
                      return (
                        <div key={msg.id} className={`mg-msg-row ${isMine ? 'mine' : ''}`}>
                          {!isMine && (
                            <div className="mg-msg-avatar" style={{ background: selected.color }}>
                              {selected.emoji}
                            </div>
                          )}
                          <div className={`mg-bubble ${isMine ? 'mine' : 'theirs'}`}>
                            {msg.text}
                            <div className="mg-bubble-time">
                              {formatTime(msg.time)}
                              {isMine && <span className="mg-bubble-status"> {msg.read ? ' ✓✓' : ' ✓'}</span>}
                            </div>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      );
                    })}
                  </React.Fragment>
                ))
              )}

              {typing && (
                <div className="mg-msg-row">
                  <div className="mg-msg-avatar" style={{ background: selected.color }}>{selected.emoji}</div>
                  <div className="mg-typing">
                    <div className="mg-typing-dot" />
                    <div className="mg-typing-dot" />
                    <div className="mg-typing-dot" />
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              <div ref={bottomRef} />
            </div>

            {/* Input */}
            <div className="mg-input-area">
              <div className="mg-input-row">
                <textarea
                  ref={textRef}
                  className="mg-textarea"
                  placeholder={`Message ${selected.name}...`}
                  value={input}
                  onChange={e => setInput(e.target.value)}
                  onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
                  rows={1}
                />
                <button
                  className="mg-send-btn"
                  onClick={sendMessage}
                  disabled={!input.trim()}
                  title="Send"
                >➤</button>
              </div>
              <div className="mg-input-hint">Press Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

    color: #9ca3af;
}

    padding: 1.5rem;
    border-top: 2px solid #f0f0f0;
    display: flex;
    gap: 1rem;
}

    flex: 1;
    padding: 0.875rem;
    border: 2px solid #e5e7eb;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-size: 1rem;
}

.chat-input input:focus {
    outline: none;
    border-color: #667eea;
}

    padding: 0.875rem 1.5rem;
    background: #667eea;
    color: white;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-weight: 600;
    cursor: pointer;
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .messaging-container {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }
    .conversations-list {
        display: none;
    }
}

FILE name: MessagingSystem.jsx

// src/pages/MessagingSystem.jsx
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext';
import './MessagingSystem.css';

const MessagingSystem = () => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [selectedConversation, setSelectedConversation] = useState(null);
  const [newMessage, setNewMessage] = useState('');

  const conversations = [
    {
      id: 1,
      name: 'Sarah - Caretaker',
      avatar: '👩‍🏫',
      lastMessage: 'Mily had a great day today!',
      time: '2 mins ago',
      unread: 2
    },
    {
      id: 2,
      name: 'Admin Office',
      avatar: '🏢',
      lastMessage: 'Payment confirmation received',
      time: '1 hour ago',
      unread: 0
    },
    {
      id: 3,
      name: 'Emma\'s Parent',
      avatar: '👨‍👩‍👧',
      lastMessage: 'Thank you for the update!',
      time: '3 hours ago',
      unread: 0
    }
  ];

  const messages = {
    1: [
      {
        id: 1,
        sender: 'caretaker',
        text: 'Good morning! Mily arrived safely.',
        time: '8:30 AM',
        avatar: '👩‍🏫'
      },
      {
        id: 2,
        sender: 'me',
        text: 'Thank you for letting me know!',
        time: '8:32 AM',
        avatar: '👤'
      },
      {
        id: 3,
        sender: 'caretaker',
        text: 'Mily had a great day today! She painted a beautiful picture.',
        time: '2 mins ago',
        avatar: '👩‍🏫'
      }
    ]
  };

  const handleSendMessage = () => {
    if (newMessage.trim()) {
      console.log('Sending message:', newMessage);
      setNewMessage('');
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="messaging-system">
      <div className="messaging-header">
        <div className="header-content">
          <h1>💬 Messages</h1>
          <p>Chat with caretakers and parents</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="messaging-container">
        {/* Conversations List */}
        <div className="conversations-list">
          <h3 style={{ marginBottom: '1rem' }}>Conversations</h3>
          {conversations.map(conv => (
            <div
              key={conv.id}
              className={`conversation-item ${selectedConversation?.id === conv.id ? 'active' : ''}`}
              onClick={() => setSelectedConversation(conv)}
            >
              <div className="conversation-avatar">{conv.avatar}</div>
              <div className="conversation-info">
                <div className="conversation-name">{conv.name}</div>
                <div className="conversation-last-message">{conv.lastMessage}</div>
              </div>
              <div className="conversation-time">{conv.time}</div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* Chat Window */}
        <div className="chat-window">
          {selectedConversation ? (
            <>
              <div className="chat-header">
                <div className="conversation-avatar">{selectedConversation.avatar}</div>
                <div>
                  <div className="conversation-name">{selectedConversation.name}</div>
                  <div style={{ fontSize: '0.85rem', color: '#6b7280' }}>Online</div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="chat-messages">
                {(messages[selectedConversation.id] || []).map(msg => (
                  <div key={msg.id} className={`message ${msg.sender === 'me' ? 'sent' : 'received'}`}>
                    <div className="message-avatar">{msg.avatar}</div>
                    <div className="message-content">
                      <div className="message-bubble">{msg.text}</div>
                      <div className="message-time">{msg.time}</div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>

              <div className="chat-input">
                <input
                  type="text"
                  placeholder="Type a message..."
                  value={newMessage}
                  onChange={(e) => setNewMessage(e.target.value)}
                  onKeyPress={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handleSendMessage()}
                />
                <button className="send-btn" onClick={handleSendMessage}>
                  Send
                </button>
              </div>
            </>
          ) : (
            <div style={{ 
              display: 'flex', 
              alignItems: 'center', 
              justifyContent: 'center', 
              height: '100%',
              color: '#9ca3af'
            }}>
              Select a conversation to start messaging
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default MessagingSystem;

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE name: NannyDetails.jsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useParams, useNavigate, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom';
import BookingModal from '../components/nanny/BookingModal';
import '../styles/NannyDetails.css';

const NannyDetails = () => {
  const { id } = useParams();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const location = useLocation();
  const [nanny, setNanny] = useState(null);
  const [showBookingModal, setShowBookingModal] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    // Mock nanny data - in real app, fetch from API
    const mockNanny = {
      id: parseInt(id),
      name: 'Sarah Johnson',
      photo: 'https://via.placeholder.com/150',
      rating: 4.8,
      reviewCount: 124,
      location: 'Downtown',
      experience: 8,
      education: 'Bachelor in Child Psychology',
      hourlyRate: 25,
      bio: 'Passionate childcare provider with 8 years of experience. Specialized in early childhood development and creative learning activities. CPR and First Aid certified.',
      specialties: ['Infant Care', 'Toddler Care', 'Special Needs', 'Tutoring', 'Cooking', 'Light Housekeeping'],
      availability: ['Monday', 'Tuesday', 'Wednesday', 'Thursday', 'Friday'],
      languages: ['English', 'Spanish'],
      certifications: ['CPR Certified', 'First Aid', 'Child Development Associate'],
      verified: true,
      featured: true,
      reviews: [
        {
          id: 1,
          author: 'Emma Thompson',
          rating: 5,
          date: '2 weeks ago',
          text: 'Sarah is amazing! My daughter loves her and has learned so much. Highly recommend!'
        },
        {
          id: 2,
          author: 'Michael Chen',
          rating: 5,
          date: '1 month ago',
          text: 'Very professional and caring. Always on time and great with communication.'
        },
        {
          id: 3,
          author: 'Lisa Martinez',
          rating: 4,
          date: '2 months ago',
          text: 'Great caretaker! My son is always happy after spending time with Sarah.'
        }
      ]
    };

    setNanny(mockNanny);

    // Check if we should auto-open booking modal
    if (location.state?.openBooking) {
      setShowBookingModal(true);
    }
  }, [id, location.state]);

  if (!nanny) {
    return (
      <div style={{ 
        display: 'flex', 
        alignItems: 'center', 
        justifyContent: 'center', 
        minHeight: '100vh' 
      }}>
        <div className="spinner-large"></div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="nanny-details-page">
      <div className="container">
        <button className="btn-back" onClick={() => navigate(-1)}>
          ← Back to Search
        </button>

        <div className="nanny-details-content">
          {/* Left Column - Profile */}
          <div className="profile-section">
            <div className="profile-card">
              <img src={nanny.photo} alt={nanny.name} className="profile-photo" />
              
              <div className="profile-badges">
                {nanny.verified && (
                  <span className="badge badge-verified">✓ Verified</span>
                )}
                {nanny.featured && (
                  <span className="badge badge-featured">⭐ Featured</span>
                )}
              </div>

              <h1 className="profile-name">{nanny.name}</h1>

              <div className="profile-rating">
                <span className="stars">
                  {'⭐'.repeat(Math.floor(nanny.rating))}
                  {nanny.rating % 1 !== 0 && '½'}
                </span>
                <span className="rating-text">
                  {nanny.rating} ({nanny.reviewCount} reviews)
                </span>
              </div>

              <div className="profile-rate">
                <span className="rate-amount">${nanny.hourlyRate}/hr</span>
              </div>

              <button 
                className="btn btn-primary btn-lg"
                onClick={() => setShowBookingModal(true)}
              >
                Book Now
              </button>

              <button className="btn btn-secondary btn-lg">
                Send Message
              </button>
            </div>

            {/* Quick Info */}
            <div className="info-card">
              <h3>Quick Info</h3>
              <div className="info-list">
                <div className="info-item">
                  <span className="info-icon">📍</span>
                  <div>
                    <strong>Location</strong>
                    <p>{nanny.location}</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="info-item">
                  <span className="info-icon">💼</span>
                  <div>
                    <strong>Experience</strong>
                    <p>{nanny.experience} years</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="info-item">
                  <span className="info-icon">🎓</span>
                  <div>
                    <strong>Education</strong>
                    <p>{nanny.education}</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="info-item">
                  <span className="info-icon">🗣️</span>
                  <div>
                    <strong>Languages</strong>
                    <p>{nanny.languages.join(', ')}</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Right Column - Details */}
          <div className="details-section">
            {/* About */}
            <div className="details-card">
              <h2>About Me</h2>
              <p>{nanny.bio}</p>
            </div>

            {/* Specialties */}
            <div className="details-card">
              <h2>Specialties</h2>
              <div className="specialties-list">
                {nanny.specialties.map((specialty, index) => (
                  <span key={index} className="specialty-badge">
                    {specialty}
                  </span>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Certifications */}
            <div className="details-card">
              <h2>Certifications</h2>
              <div className="certifications-list">
                {nanny.certifications.map((cert, index) => (
                  <div key={index} className="certification-item">
                    <span className="cert-icon">✓</span>
                    <span>{cert}</span>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Availability */}
            <div className="details-card">
              <h2>Availability</h2>
              <div className="availability-days">
                {nanny.availability.map((day, index) => (
                  <span key={index} className="day-badge">
                    {day}
                  </span>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Reviews */}
            <div className="details-card">
              <h2>Reviews ({nanny.reviewCount})</h2>
              <div className="reviews-list">
                {nanny.reviews.map((review) => (
                  <div key={review.id} className="review-item">
                    <div className="review-header">
                      <div>
                        <strong>{review.author}</strong>
                        <div className="review-rating">
                          {'⭐'.repeat(review.rating)}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <span className="review-date">{review.date}</span>
                    </div>
                    <p className="review-text">{review.text}</p>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Booking Modal */}
      {showBookingModal && (
        <BookingModal 
          nanny={nanny}
          onClose={() => setShowBookingModal(false)}
        />
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

export default NannyDetails;

    /* ── Empty State ── */

      text-align: center; padding: 80px 24px; grid-column: 1/-1;
    }
    .nl-empty-icon { font-size: 4rem; margin-bottom: 16px; }
    .nl-empty h3 { font-family:'Baloo 2',cursive; font-size:1.5rem; color:#0F172A; margin-bottom:8px; }
    .nl-empty p { color:#64748B; font-size:0.95rem; }

    /* ── Modal ── */
    .nl-modal-bg {
      position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 200;
      background: rgba(15,23,42,0.55);
      backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      padding: 24px;
      animation: fadeIn 0.2s ease;
    }
    @keyframes fadeIn { from{opacity:0} to{opacity:1} }
    .nl-modal {
      background: white; border-radius: 28px;
      width: 100%; max-width: 540px;
      overflow: hidden;
      box-shadow: 0 32px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
      animation: popUp 0.35s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);
    }
    @keyframes popUp {
      from { opacity:0; transform:scale(0.9) translateY(20px); }
      to   { opacity:1; transform:scale(1) translateY(0); }
    }
    .nm-banner {
      height: 140px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;

      position: absolute; top: 14px; right: 14px;

    }

    @media (max-width: 768px) {
      .nl-hero { padding: 60px 24px 40px; }
      .nl-hero h1 { font-size:2rem; }
      .nl-controls { padding: 16px 24px; }
      .nl-grid-wrap { padding: 16px 24px 48px; }
      .nl-results-bar { padding: 16px 24px 0; }
      .nl-grid.list-view .nc { grid-template-columns:1fr; }

  `;
  document.head.appendChild(style);

const NANNIES = [
  { id:1, emoji:'👩', name:'Priya Sharma', role:'Child Educator', stars:5, reviews:48, exp:'5 yrs', rate:'₹350/hr', location:'Ahmedabad', tags:['Toddlers','Homework Help','Arts & Crafts'], available:true, bg:'linear-gradient(135deg,#BAE6FD,#7DD3FC)', about:'Experienced educator with a passion for early childhood development. Specialized in toddler care and creative learning activities.' },
  { id:2, emoji:'👨', name:'Arjun Patel', role:'Infant Specialist', stars:5, reviews:62, exp:'7 yrs', rate:'₹400/hr', location:'Surat', tags:['Infants','Sleep Training','Nutrition'], available:true, bg:'linear-gradient(135deg,#BBF7D0,#6EE7B7)', about:'Certified infant care specialist with 7 years of experience. Expert in sleep routines and nutritional planning for babies.' },
  { id:3, emoji:'👩‍🦱', name:'Meera Nair', role:'Special Needs', stars:4, reviews:35, exp:'4 yrs', rate:'₹450/hr', location:'Ahmedabad', tags:['Special Needs','Therapy Support','Patience'], available:false, bg:'linear-gradient(135deg,#FEE2E2,#FCA5A5)', about:'Dedicated caretaker with specialized training in supporting children with special needs. Compassionate and highly patient.' },
  { id:4, emoji:'👩‍🦳', name:'Sunita Devi', role:'Toddler Expert', stars:5, reviews:91, exp:'10 yrs', rate:'₹300/hr', location:'Vadodara', tags:['Toddlers','Storytelling','Cooking'], available:true, bg:'linear-gradient(135deg,#EDE9FE,#C4B5FD)', about:'10 years of dedicated toddler care. Loves storytelling and cooking healthy meals for children. A grandmother figure your kids will adore.' },
  { id:5, emoji:'🧑', name:'Rahul Kumar', role:'Activity Coach', stars:4, reviews:27, exp:'3 yrs', rate:'₹280/hr', location:'Surat', tags:['Sports','Outdoor Play','Fitness'], available:true, bg:'linear-gradient(135deg,#FEF3C7,#FDE68A)', about:'Former PE teacher turned caretaker. Keeps children active, fit, and engaged through fun outdoor activities and sports.' },
  { id:6, emoji:'👩‍🏫', name:'Kavita Singh', role:'Learning Coach', stars:5, reviews:54, exp:'6 yrs', rate:'₹380/hr', location:'Ahmedabad', tags:['Academics','STEM','Reading'], available:true, bg:'linear-gradient(135deg,#CFFAFE,#A5F3FC)', about:'Former school teacher passionate about making learning fun. Specializes in STEM activities and reading programs for ages 4–12.' },
  { id:7, emoji:'👩‍🍼', name:'Divya Menon', role:'Newborn Care', stars:5, reviews:43, exp:'8 yrs', rate:'₹500/hr', location:'Vadodara', tags:['Newborns','Breastfeeding Support','Swaddling'], available:false, bg:'linear-gradient(135deg,#FCE7F3,#F9A8D4)', about:'Specialized newborn care nurse. Expert in supporting new mothers and ensuring newborn health, comfort, and development.' },
  { id:8, emoji:'🧑‍🎨', name:'Vikram Joshi', role:'Creative Arts', stars:4, reviews:19, exp:'2 yrs', rate:'₹260/hr', location:'Surat', tags:['Art','Music','Drama'], available:true, bg:'linear-gradient(135deg,#ECFDF5,#A7F3D0)', about:'Art school graduate who brings creativity into childcare. Teaches painting, music basics, and drama to spark imagination.' },

const ROLES = ['All', 'Child Educator', 'Infant Specialist', 'Special Needs', 'Toddler Expert', 'Activity Coach', 'Learning Coach', 'Newborn Care', 'Creative Arts'];
const LOCATIONS = ['All Locations', 'Ahmedabad', 'Surat', 'Vadodara'];
const SORT_OPTIONS = ['Rating: High to Low', 'Price: Low to High', 'Price: High to Low', 'Experience: Most'];

export default function NannyList() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [search, setSearch]       = useState('');
  const [role, setRole]           = useState('All');
  const [location, setLocation]   = useState('All Locations');
  const [availability, setAvail]  = useState('All');
  const [sort, setSort]           = useState('Rating: High to Low');
  const [view, setView]           = useState('grid');
  const [selected, setSelected]   = useState(null);
  const [toastMsg, setToastMsg]   = useState('');

  useEffect(() => { injectCSS(); }, []);

  const showToast = (msg) => {
    setToastMsg(msg);
    setTimeout(() => setToastMsg(''), 3000);
  };

  const filtered = useMemo(() => {
    let list = [...NANNIES];

    if (search.trim()) {
      const q = search.toLowerCase();
      list = list.filter(n =>
        n.name.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
        n.role.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
        n.tags.some(t => t.toLowerCase().includes(q)) ||
        n.location.toLowerCase().includes(q)
      );
    }
    if (role !== 'All') list = list.filter(n => n.role === role);
    if (location !== 'All Locations') list = list.filter(n => n.location === location);
    if (availability === 'Available') list = list.filter(n => n.available);
    if (availability === 'Busy') list = list.filter(n => !n.available);

    list.sort((a, b) => {
      if (sort === 'Rating: High to Low') return b.stars - a.stars;
      if (sort === 'Price: Low to High') return parseInt(a.rate) - parseInt(b.rate);
      if (sort === 'Price: High to Low') return parseInt(b.rate) - parseInt(a.rate);
      if (sort === 'Experience: Most') return parseInt(b.exp) - parseInt(a.exp);
      return 0;
    });

    return list;
  }, [search, role, location, availability, sort]);

  const handleBook = (nanny) => {
    setSelected(null);
    showToast(`✅ Booking request sent to ${nanny.name}!`);
  };

  return (
    <div className="nl-root">

      {/* Toast */}
      {toastMsg && (
        <div style={{
          position:'fixed', top:20, right:24, zIndex:999,
          background:'#0F172A', color:'white',
          padding:'12px 22px', borderRadius:14,
          fontWeight:700, fontSize:'0.9rem',
          boxShadow:'0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.2)',
          animation:'cardPop 0.3s ease'
        }}>{toastMsg}</div>
      )}

      {/* Hero */}
      <div className="nl-hero">
        <div className="nl-hero-emojis">👩‍🍼 🌟 👨‍🏫 🎨 🌈 👶</div>
        <div className="nl-hero-tag">🌟 800+ Verified Caretakers</div>
        <h1>Find Your Perfect Caretaker 🔍</h1>
        <p>Browse background-verified, trained nannies near you. Filter, compare, and book in minutes.</p>
      </div>

      {/* Search & Filters */}
      <div className="nl-controls">
        <div className="nl-search-wrap">
          <span className="nl-search-icon">🔍</span>
          <input
            className="nl-search"
            type="text"
            placeholder="Search by name, skill, location..."
            value={search}
            onChange={e => setSearch(e.target.value)}
          />
        </div>

        <div className="nl-filter-group">
          {['All', 'Available', 'Busy'].map(a => (
            <button
              key={a}
              className={`nl-pill ${availability === a ? 'active' : ''}`}
              onClick={() => setAvail(a)}
            >{a === 'All' ? '👥 All' : a === 'Available' ? '🟢 Available' : '🔴 Busy'}</button>
          ))}
        </div>

        <select className="nl-select" value={location} onChange={e => setLocation(e.target.value)}>
          {LOCATIONS.map(l => <option key={l}>{l}</option>)}
        </select>

        <select className="nl-select" value={role} onChange={e => setRole(e.target.value)}>
          {ROLES.map(r => <option key={r}>{r}</option>)}
        </select>

        <select className="nl-select" value={sort} onChange={e => setSort(e.target.value)}>
          {SORT_OPTIONS.map(s => <option key={s}>{s}</option>)}
        </select>
      </div>

      {/* Results bar */}
      <div className="nl-results-bar">
        <div className="nl-results-count">
          Showing <strong>{filtered.length}</strong> of {NANNIES.length} caretakers
        </div>
        <div className="nl-view-toggle">
          <button className={`nl-view-btn ${view === 'grid' ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => setView('grid')}>⊞</button>
          <button className={`nl-view-btn ${view === 'list' ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => setView('list')}>≡</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Cards Grid */}
      <div className="nl-grid-wrap">
        <div className={`nl-grid ${view === 'list' ? 'list-view' : ''}`}>
          {filtered.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="nl-empty">
              <div className="nl-empty-icon">🔍</div>
              <h3>No caretakers found</h3>
              <p>Try changing your filters or search terms</p>
            </div>
          ) : (
            filtered.map((n, i) => (
              <div
                className="nc"
                key={n.id}
                style={{ animationDelay: `${i * 0.05}s` }}
                onClick={() => setSelected(n)}
              >
                <div className="nc-banner" style={{ background: n.bg }}>
                  <div className="nc-available" style={{}} className ={`nc-available ${n.available ? 'yes' : 'no'}`}>
                    {n.available ? '🟢 Available' : '🔴 Busy'}
                  </div>
                  <div className="nc-verified">✅ Verified</div>
                  <div className="nc-avatar">{n.emoji}</div>
                </div>
                <div className="nc-body">
                  <div className="nc-name">{n.name}</div>
                  <div className="nc-role">{n.role}</div>
                  <div>
                    <span className="nc-stars">{'★'.repeat(n.stars)}{'☆'.repeat(5 - n.stars)}</span>
                    <span className="nc-rating-count">({n.reviews} reviews)</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="nc-tags">
                    {n.tags.map(t => <span className="nc-tag" key={t}>{t}</span>)}
                  </div>
                  <div className="nc-info-row">
                    <div className="nc-info-item">
                      <div className="nc-info-val">{n.rate}</div>
                      <div className="nc-info-lbl">Rate</div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="nc-info-item">
                      <div className="nc-info-val">{n.exp}</div>
                      <div className="nc-info-lbl">Experience</div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="nc-info-item">
                      <div className="nc-info-val">📍</div>
                      <div className="nc-info-lbl">{n.location}</div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <button className="nc-btn" onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); setSelected(n); }}>
                    View Profile & Book
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Detail Modal */}
      {selected && (
        <div className="nl-modal-bg" onClick={() => setSelected(null)}>
          <div className="nl-modal" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
            <div className="nm-banner" style={{ background: selected.bg }}>
              <button className="nm-close" onClick={() => setSelected(null)}>✕</button>
              <div className="nm-avatar-lg">{selected.emoji}</div>
            </div>
            <div className="nm-body">
              <div className="nm-name">{selected.name}</div>
              <div className="nm-role">{selected.role} · 📍 {selected.location}</div>
              <div className="nm-stars">
                {'★'.repeat(selected.stars)}{'☆'.repeat(5 - selected.stars)}
                <span style={{ color:'#94A3B8', fontSize:'0.82rem', marginLeft:6 }}>
                  ({selected.reviews} reviews)
                </span>
              </div>
              <div className="nm-tags">
                {selected.tags.map(t => <span className="nm-tag" key={t}>{t}</span>)}
                <span className={`nm-tag`} style={{ background: selected.available ? '#D1FAE5' : '#FEE2E2', color: selected.available ? '#059669' : '#E11D48' }}>
                  {selected.available ? '🟢 Available' : '🔴 Busy'}
                </span>
              </div>
              <div className="nm-stats">
                <div className="nm-stat">
                  <div className="nm-stat-val">{selected.exp}</div>
                  <div className="nm-stat-lbl">Experience</div>
                </div>
                <div className="nm-stat">
                  <div className="nm-stat-val">{selected.rate}</div>
                  <div className="nm-stat-lbl">Per Hour</div>
                </div>
                <div className="nm-stat">
                  <div className="nm-stat-val">{selected.reviews}</div>
                  <div className="nm-stat-lbl">Reviews</div>
                </div>
              </div>
              <p className="nm-about">{selected.about}</p>
              <button
                className="nm-book-btn"
                onClick={() => handleBook(selected)}
                disabled={!selected.available}
                style={!selected.available ? { opacity: 0.5, cursor: 'not-allowed' } : {}}
              >
                {selected.available ? '📅 Book Now' : '🔴 Currently Unavailable'}
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE name: NannyProfile.jsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useParams, useNavigate, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom';
import Loader from '../components/common/Loader';
import BookingModal from '../components/nanny/BookingModal';
import '../styles/NannyProfile.css';

const NannyProfile = () => {
  const { id } = useParams();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const location = useLocation();
  const [nanny, setNanny] = useState(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [showBookingModal, setShowBookingModal] = useState(false);
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('about');

  useEffect(() => {
    // Simulate API call
    setTimeout(() => {
      const foundNanny = mockNannies.find(n => n.id === parseInt(id));
      setNanny(foundNanny);
      setLoading(false);

      // Open booking modal if navigated from "Book Now"
      if (location.state?.openBooking) {
        setShowBookingModal(true);
      }
    }, 500);
  }, [id, location]);

  if (loading) {
    return <Loader />;
  }

  if (!nanny) {
    return (
      <div className="not-found">
        <h2>Nanny Not Found</h2>
        <button onClick={() => navigate('/nannies')} className="btn btn-primary">
          Back to List
        </button>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="nanny-profile-page">
      <button onClick={() => navigate('/nannies')} className="btn-back">
        ← Back to List
      </button>

      <div className="profile-header">
        <div className="profile-header-left">
          <img src={nanny.photo} alt={nanny.name} className="profile-photo" />
          <div className="profile-basic-info">
            <h1>{nanny.name}</h1>
            <div className="profile-rating">
              <span className="stars">
                {'⭐'.repeat(Math.floor(nanny.rating))}
              </span>
              <span className="rating-text">
                {nanny.rating} ({nanny.reviewCount} reviews)
              </span>
            </div>
            <div className="profile-badges">
              {nanny.verified && <span className="badge badge-verified">✓ Verified</span>}
              {nanny.featured && <span className="badge badge-featured">⭐ Featured</span>}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="profile-header-right">
          <div className="profile-rate-card">
            <div className="rate-amount">${nanny.hourlyRate}/hour</div>
            <button
              className="btn btn-primary btn-large"
              onClick={() => setShowBookingModal(true)}
            >
              Book Now
            </button>
            <button className="btn btn-secondary btn-large">
              Send Message
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="profile-content">
        <div className="profile-sidebar">
          <div className="info-card">
            <h3>Quick Info</h3>
            <div className="info-list">
              <div className="info-item">
                <span className="info-icon">📍</span>
                <div>
                  <strong>Location</strong>
                  <p>{nanny.location}</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="info-item">
                <span className="info-icon">💼</span>
                <div>
                  <strong>Experience</strong>
                  <p>{nanny.experience} years</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="info-item">
                <span className="info-icon">🎓</span>
                <div>
                  <strong>Education</strong>
                  <p>{nanny.education}</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="info-item">
                <span className="info-icon">🗣️</span>
                <div>
                  <strong>Languages</strong>
                  <p>{nanny.languages.join(', ')}</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="info-card">
            <h3>Availability</h3>
            <div className="availability-list">
              {nanny.availability.map(day => (
                <div key={day} className="availability-day">
                  ✓ {day}
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="info-card">
            <h3>Specialties</h3>
            <div className="specialties-list">
              {nanny.specialties.map((specialty, index) => (
                <span key={index} className="specialty-tag">
                  {specialty}
                </span>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="info-card">
            <h3>Certifications</h3>
            <div className="certifications-list">
              {nanny.certifications.map((cert, index) => (
                <div key={index} className="certification-item">
                  ✓ {cert}
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="profile-main">
          <div className="profile-tabs">
            <button
              className={`tab ${activeTab === 'about' ? 'active' : ''}`}
              onClick={() => setActiveTab('about')}
            >
              About
            </button>
            <button
              className={`tab ${activeTab === 'reviews' ? 'active' : ''}`}
              onClick={() => setActiveTab('reviews')}
            >
              Reviews ({nanny.reviewCount})
            </button>
          </div>

          <div className="tab-content">
            {activeTab === 'about' && (
              <div className="about-section">
                <h2>About {nanny.name}</h2>
                <p className="bio">{nanny.bio}</p>
                <p className="about-text">{nanny.about}</p>
              </div>
            )}

            {activeTab === 'reviews' && (
              <div className="reviews-section">
                <h2>Reviews</h2>
                {nanny.reviews.map(review => (
                  <div key={review.id} className="review-card">
                    <div className="review-header">
                      <div className="review-author">
                        <strong>{review.parent}</strong>
                        <span className="review-date">{review.date}</span>
                      </div>
                      <div className="review-rating">
                        {'⭐'.repeat(review.rating)}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <p className="review-comment">{review.comment}</p>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {showBookingModal && (
        <BookingModal
          nanny={nanny}
          onClose={() => setShowBookingModal(false)}
        />
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

export default NannyProfile;

FILE name: NannySearch.jsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import NannyCard from '../components/nanny/NannyCard';
import NannyFilters from '../components/nanny/NannyFilters';
import '../styles/NannySearch.css';

const NannySearch = () => {
  const [nannies, setNannies] = useState([]);
  const [filteredNannies, setFilteredNannies] = useState([]);
  const [filters, setFilters] = useState({});
  const [sortBy, setSortBy] = useState('rating');

  useEffect(() => {
    // Mock nanny data - in real app, fetch from API
    const mockNannies = [
      {
        id: 1,
        name: 'Sarah Johnson',
        photo: 'https://via.placeholder.com/150',
        rating: 4.8,
        reviewCount: 124,
        location: 'Downtown',
        experience: 8,
        education: 'Bachelor in Child Psychology',
        hourlyRate: 25,
        bio: 'Passionate childcare provider with 8 years of experience.',
        specialties: ['Infant Care', 'Toddler Care', 'Special Needs'],
        availability: ['Monday', 'Tuesday', 'Wednesday', 'Thursday', 'Friday'],
        verified: true,
        featured: true
      },
      {
        id: 2,
        name: 'Emily Rodriguez',
        photo: 'https://via.placeholder.com/150',
        rating: 4.9,
        reviewCount: 89,
        location: 'Suburbs',
        experience: 5,
        education: 'Early Childhood Education Diploma',
        hourlyRate: 22,
        bio: 'Certified early childhood educator with a passion for learning.',
        specialties: ['Tutoring', 'Cooking', 'Light Housekeeping'],
        availability: ['Monday', 'Wednesday', 'Friday', 'Saturday'],
        verified: true,
        featured: false
      },
      {
        id: 3,
        name: 'Michael Chen',
        photo: 'https://via.placeholder.com/150',
        rating: 4.7,
        reviewCount: 67,
        location: 'North Side',
        experience: 10,
        education: 'Masters in Child Development',
        hourlyRate: 30,
        bio: 'Experienced caretaker specializing in special needs care.',
        specialties: ['Special Needs', 'Infant Care', 'Tutoring'],
        availability: ['Tuesday', 'Thursday', 'Saturday', 'Sunday'],
        verified: true,
        featured: true
      },
      {
        id: 4,
        name: 'Jessica Williams',
        photo: 'https://via.placeholder.com/150',
        rating: 4.6,
        reviewCount: 45,
        location: 'East Side',
        experience: 3,
        education: 'Associate Degree in Early Childhood',
        hourlyRate: 18,
        bio: 'Energetic and creative caretaker who loves outdoor activities.',
        specialties: ['Toddler Care', 'Cooking', 'Light Housekeeping'],
        availability: ['Monday', 'Tuesday', 'Wednesday', 'Thursday'],
        verified: false,
        featured: false
      }
    ];

    setNannies(mockNannies);
    setFilteredNannies(mockNannies);
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    let result = [...nannies];

    // Apply filters
    if (filters.search) {
      result = result.filter(nanny =>
        nanny.name.toLowerCase().includes(filters.search.toLowerCase())
      );
    }

    if (filters.location) {
      result = result.filter(nanny => nanny.location === filters.location);
    }

    if (filters.minExperience) {
      result = result.filter(nanny => nanny.experience >= parseInt(filters.minExperience));
    }

    if (filters.maxRate) {
      result = result.filter(nanny => nanny.hourlyRate <= parseInt(filters.maxRate));
    }

    if (filters.verifiedOnly) {
      result = result.filter(nanny => nanny.verified);
    }

    if (filters.availability && filters.availability.length > 0) {
      result = result.filter(nanny =>
        filters.availability.some(day => nanny.availability.includes(day))
      );
    }

    if (filters.specialties && filters.specialties.length > 0) {
      result = result.filter(nanny =>
        filters.specialties.some(specialty => nanny.specialties.includes(specialty))
      );
    }

    // Apply sorting
    switch (sortBy) {
      case 'rating':
        result.sort((a, b) => b.rating - a.rating);
        break;
      case 'experience':
        result.sort((a, b) => b.experience - a.experience);
        break;
      case 'price-low':
        result.sort((a, b) => a.hourlyRate - b.hourlyRate);
        break;
      case 'price-high':
        result.sort((a, b) => b.hourlyRate - a.hourlyRate);
        break;
      default:
        break;
    }

    setFilteredNannies(result);
  }, [filters, sortBy, nannies]);

  return (
    <div className="nanny-search-page">
      <div className="search-header">
        <div className="container">
          <h1>Find Your Perfect Caretaker</h1>
          <p>Browse certified and experienced childcare professionals</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="container">
        <div className="search-content">
          {/* Filters Sidebar */}
          <aside className="filters-sidebar">
            <NannyFilters onFilterChange={setFilters} />
          </aside>

          {/* Results */}
          <div className="search-results">
            <div className="results-header">
              <div className="results-count">
                <strong>{filteredNannies.length}</strong> caretakers found
              </div>
              <div className="results-sort">
                <label>Sort by:</label>
                <select value={sortBy} onChange={(e) => setSortBy(e.target.value)}>
                  <option value="rating">Highest Rated</option>
                  <option value="experience">Most Experienced</option>
                  <option value="price-low">Price: Low to High</option>
                  <option value="price-high">Price: High to Low</option>
                </select>
              </div>
            </div>

            {filteredNannies.length > 0 ? (
              <div className="nannies-grid">
                {filteredNannies.map((nanny) => (
                  <NannyCard key={nanny.id} nanny={nanny} />
                ))}
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="no-results">
                <div className="no-results-icon">🔍</div>
                <h3>No caretakers found</h3>
                <p>Try adjusting your filters to see more results</p>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default NannySearch;

const FILTERS = [
  { key:'all',      icon:'🔔', label:'All Notifications' },
  { key:'booking',  icon:'📅', label:'Bookings'          },
  { key:'payment',  icon:'💳', label:'Payments'          },
  { key:'review',   icon:'⭐', label:'Reviews'           },
  { key:'system',   icon:'⚙️', label:'System'            },
  { key:'alert',    icon:'🚨', label:'Alerts'            },
  { key:'training', icon:'🎓', label:'Training'          },
];

export default function Notifications() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const { user }  = useAuth();
  const [notifs,  setNotifs]  = useState([]);
  const [filter,  setFilter]  = useState('all');

  useEffect(() => {
    injectCSS();
    const role    = user?.role?.toLowerCase() || 'parent';
    const saved   = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(`childcare_notifs_${role}`) || '[]');
    const demo    = DEMO_NOTIFS[role] || DEMO_NOTIFS.parent;
    setNotifs(saved.length ? saved : demo);
  }, [user]);

  const save = (updated) => {
    const role = user?.role?.toLowerCase() || 'parent';
    localStorage.setItem(`childcare_notifs_${role}`, JSON.stringify(updated));
    setNotifs(updated);
  };

  const markRead    = (id) => save(notifs.map(n => n.id === id ? {...n, unread:false} : n));
  const deleteNotif = (id) => save(notifs.filter(n => n.id !== id));
  const markAllRead = () => save(notifs.map(n => ({...n, unread:false})));
  const clearAll    = () => save([]);

  const filtered = filter === 'all' ? notifs : notifs.filter(n => n.type === filter);
  const unreadCount = notifs.filter(n => n.unread).length;

  // Group by date
  const grouped = filtered.reduce((acc, n) => {
    if (!acc[n.date]) acc[n.date] = [];
    acc[n.date].push(n);
    return acc;
  }, {});

  const countByType = (type) => notifs.filter(n => n.type === type && n.unread).length;

  return (
    <div className="nt-root">
      <div className="nt-layout">

        {/* Sidebar */}
        <div className="nt-sidebar">
          <div className="nt-logo">
            <div className="nt-logo-icon">🌟</div>
            <div className="nt-logo-text">ChildCare</div>
          </div>

          <div className="nt-sidebar-label">Filters</div>
          <div className="nt-filter">
            {FILTERS.map(f => {
              const cnt = f.key === 'all' ? unreadCount : countByType(f.key);
              return (
                <button
                  key={f.key}
                  className={`nt-filter-btn ${filter === f.key ? 'active' : ''}`}
                  onClick={() => setFilter(f.key)}
                >
                  <span className="nt-filter-icon">{f.icon}</span>
                  {f.label}
                  {cnt > 0 && <span className="nt-filter-count">{cnt}</span>}
                </button>
              );
            })}
          </div>

          <button className="nt-back-btn" onClick={() => navigate(-1)}>
            ← Back to Dashboard
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Main */}
        <div className="nt-main">
          <div className="nt-top">
            <div>
              <div className="nt-heading">
                Notifications {unreadCount > 0 && <span style={{color:'#FF6B6B'}}>({unreadCount})</span>}
              </div>
              <div className="nt-subheading">
                {user?.name || user?.fullName || 'User'} · {user?.role || 'User'} account
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="nt-actions">
              {unreadCount > 0 && (
                <button className="nt-action-btn" onClick={markAllRead}>Mark all read</button>
              )}
              <button className="nt-action-btn primary" onClick={clearAll}>Clear all</button>
            </div>
          </div>

          {Object.keys(grouped).length === 0 ? (
            <div className="nt-empty">
              <div className="nt-empty-icon">🎉</div>
              <div className="nt-empty-title">You're all caught up!</div>
              <div className="nt-empty-sub">No notifications in this category</div>
            </div>
          ) : (
            Object.entries(grouped).map(([date, items]) => (
              <div key={date} className="nt-date-group">
                <div className="nt-date-label">{date}</div>
                {items.map((n, i) => {
                  const cfg = TYPE_CONFIG[n.type] || TYPE_CONFIG.system;
                  return (
                    <div
                      key={n.id}
                      className={`nt-card ${n.unread ? 'unread' : ''}`}
                      style={{ animationDelay: `${i * 0.06}s` }}
                      onClick={() => markRead(n.id)}
                    >
                      <div className="nt-card-icon" style={{ background: cfg.bg }}>
                        {n.icon}
                      </div>
                      <div className="nt-card-body">
                        <div className="nt-card-title">{n.title}</div>
                        <div className="nt-card-desc">{n.desc}</div>
                        <div className="nt-card-meta">
                          <span className="nt-card-time">🕐 {n.time}</span>
                          <span
                            className="nt-card-badge"
                            style={{ background: cfg.badge, color: cfg.badgeColor, border: `1px solid ${cfg.badgeColor}22` }}
                          >{cfg.badgeText}</span>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <div className="nt-card-right">
                        {n.unread && <div className="nt-unread-dot" />}
                        <button
                          className="nt-del-btn"
                          onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); deleteNotif(n.id); }}
                          title="Delete"
                        >✕</button>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            ))
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

FILE name: ParentSignup.jsx

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext';

const injectCSS = () => {
  if (document.getElementById('parent-signup-styles')) return;
  const style = document.createElement('style');
  style.id = 'parent-signup-styles';

    @keyframes psSpin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
